themes.label: Fear/Anxiety
themes.summary: This chapter deals with fear, dread, anxiety, alarm, or the call not to be afraid. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 1 verse. Commentary leans on "Saul's request that his armor-bearer kill him and the servant's refusal create his final cris...". Word-study detail reinforces "יָרֵ֖א: afraid - to fear; morally to revere; causatively to frighten".
